faqs.question: What pests are most common in Sheepshead Bay?
faqs.answer: Sheepshead Bay properties frequently deal with German cockroaches, mice, ants, and silverfish due to the area's proximity to water and older building stock. Bedbugs are also a concern in multi-family dwellings. Our general pest control service addresses all these pests with targeted treatments designed for Brooklyn's coastal neighborhoods.
